nasb.text: Again he prostrated himself and said, “What is your servant, that you should regard a dead dog like me?”

esv.text: And he paid homage and said, “What is your servant, that you should show regard for a dead dog such as I?”

cnv.text: 米非波設再叩拜說：“僕人算甚麼？你竟然眷顧我這個像條死狗的人！”

ccb.text: 米非波设再次叩拜，说：“仆人算什么？不过像一条死狗罢了，你竟这样眷顾我！”
